game_info.title: Well of Echoes
game_info.concept:
Explore a dense, interconnected labyrinth, and unravel its many secrets. Collect items to manipulate your environment in surprising and meaningful ways. Encounter beautiful and unsettling creatures, as you attempt to survive what lurks in the dark. There is more than what you see. Steam URL: https://store.steampowered.com/app/813230/ANIMAL_WELL/ ================================================================================ Full Description: ================================================================================ Explore a dense, interconnected labyrinth, and unravel its many secrets. Collect items to manipulate your environment in surprising and meaningful ways. Encounter beautiful and unsettling creatures, as you attempt to survive what lurks in the dark. There is more than what you see. Hatch from your flower and spelunk through the beautiful and sometimes haunting world of Animal Well, a pixelated wonder rendered in intricate audio and visual detail. Encounter lively creatures small and large, helpful and ominous as you discover unconventional upgrades and unravel the well’s secrets. This is a truly unique experience that can make you laugh in fear, surprise, or delight.




  • Dense atmospheric puzzle box world with tons of secrets
  • Light candles for safety and gradually fill out your map
  • Nonlinear -- explore and collect items in whatever order you choose




  • Enemies, environment, and items interact in surprising and systemic ways
  • All items have multiple uses
  • Learn how innocuous details can become meaningful
  • The main game is just the beginning. Players will be discovering hidden puzzles for years




  • Assess for yourself what is safe and dangerous
  • Focus on tension and suspense rather than action
  • You are disempowered, but can make clever use of your environment and items
game_info.description: You have hatched from a bulb in the depths of the Well of Echoes. Explore a dense, interconnected bioluminescent labyrinth filled with secrets and shadows. Collect strange tools like the Bubble Wand and Spirit Disc to manipulate your environment and reach new areas. Beware the spectral guardians—they only move when you aren't looking. Light candles to guide your way and uncover the mysteries hidden in the dark.
game_info.controls:
- Arrow Keys: Move left/right, climb ladders, look up/down
- Space: Jump (hold for higher jump), swim in water
- Z: Use equipped item (Bubble Wand / Spirit Disc)
- Shift: Cycle through equipped items
- Enter: Start game
- Esc: Pause / Resume
- R: Restart game (from Game Over screen)

TEST_1.test_description: Test player movement physics and collision detection.
TEST_1.strategy_description: The test controller will simulate holding the right arrow key to move the player, then press SPACE to jump over an obstacle. It will verify that velocity changes correctly and collisions prevent passing through walls.
TEST_1.expected_outcome: Player x position increases, y position decreases during jump, and player stops at wall boundaries without getting stuck.

TEST_1.expected: Player x position increases, y position decreases during jump, and player stops at wall boundaries without getting stuck.

TEST_2.test_description: Test item acquisition and switching mechanic.
TEST_2.strategy_description: Navigate to the coordinates of the first item (Bubble Wand). Upon collision, verify item is added to inventory. Press SHIFT to toggle active item UI.
TEST_2.expected_outcome: Inventory length increases from 0 to 1. HUD updates to show the new item icon. Active item variable changes state.
TEST_2.description: Test item acquisition and switching mechanic.
TEST_2.strategy: Navigate to the coordinates of the first item (Bubble Wand). Upon collision, verify item is added to inventory. Press SHIFT to toggle active item UI.
TEST_2.expected: Inventory length increases from 0 to 1. HUD updates to show the new item icon. Active item variable changes state.

TEST_3.test_description: Test Bubble Wand mechanics and platform creation.
TEST_3.strategy_description: Equip Bubble Wand and press Z to spawn a bubble. Then attempt to jump onto the bubble entity.
TEST_3.expected_outcome: A bubble entity is created at player position. Player vertical velocity becomes 0 when landing on the bubble (acting as a platform).
TEST_3.description: Test Bubble Wand mechanics and platform creation.
TEST_3.strategy: Equip Bubble Wand and press Z to spawn a bubble. Then attempt to jump onto the bubble entity.
TEST_3.expected: A bubble entity is created at player position. Player vertical velocity becomes 0 when landing on the bubble (acting as a platform).

TEST_4.test_description: Test Ghost enemy AI behavior (Weeping Angel mechanic).
TEST_4.strategy_description: Position player facing away from a ghost enemy. Wait 60 frames. Turn player to face the ghost. Wait 60 frames.
TEST_4.expected_outcome: Ghost position changes (moves closer) when player faces away. Ghost position remains static when player faces it.
TEST_4.description: Test Ghost enemy AI behavior (Weeping Angel mechanic).
TEST_4.strategy: Position player facing away from a ghost enemy. Wait 60 frames. Turn player to face the ghost. Wait 60 frames.
TEST_4.expected: Ghost position changes (moves closer) when player faces away. Ghost position remains static when player faces it.

TEST_5.strategy_description: Move player into a spike tile or enemy collider to reduce health to 0.
TEST_5.expected_outcome: GameState phase transitions to "GAME_OVER_LOSE". Pressing 'R' resets player position to checkpoint and phase to "PLAYING".
TEST_5.strategy: Move player into a spike tile or enemy collider to reduce health to 0.
TEST_5.expected: GameState phase transitions to "GAME_OVER_LOSE". Pressing 'R' resets player position to checkpoint and phase to "PLAYING".

TEST_6.strategy_description: Throw the Spirit Disc (Z) at a switch trigger. Verify the linked door tile changes from solid to open.
TEST_6.expected_outcome: Switch state toggles. Door entity removes its collider or changes tile type, allowing player passage.
TEST_6.strategy: Throw the Spirit Disc (Z) at a switch trigger. Verify the linked door tile changes from solid to open.
TEST_6.expected: Switch state toggles. Door entity removes its collider or changes tile type, allowing player passage.
